style_prompt: Editorial cover illustration for a whitepaper. Muted Alberta cream (#F7F4ED) base, navy (#1A3A6E) and rust (#C2491A) accents. Print-quality archival feel. No text, no logos. Wide cover aspect.
image_prompt: An editorial illustration of four review agents, one green, one amber-yellow, one rust-red, one navy-blue, working in concert and in balance around a single application as it passes through a checkpoint or gate. Each agent contributes its own check and the four combine into one verdict. A sense of harmonious checks and balances guarding one piece of work. Muted Alberta cream base with clear green, amber-yellow, rust-red, and navy-blue accents, archival print quality, no text, no logos. All text labels in Canadian French. Match the composition of the source image exactly; only the text labels change.
composed_prompt:
Editorial cover illustration for a whitepaper. Muted Alberta cream (#F7F4ED) base, navy (#1A3A6E) and rust (#C2491A) accents. Print-quality archival feel. No text, no logos. Wide cover aspect.

Subject: An editorial illustration of four review agents, one green, one amber-yellow, one rust-red, one navy-blue, working in concert and in balance around a single application as it passes through a checkpoint or gate. Each agent contributes its own check and the four combine into one verdict. A sense of harmonious checks and balances guarding one piece of work. Muted Alberta cream base with clear green, amber-yellow, rust-red, and navy-blue accents, archival print quality, no text, no logos. All text labels in Canadian French.
